title: Attuned
description: A weaponry mod about forks, just not for dining.
body:
# Attuned!
Attuned is a small weaponry mod about Tuning Forks, a new weapon with various forms of combat.

By default, the Tuning Fork can block to repel attacks, and throw the user in the opposite direction they are looking in.

However, Tuning Forks also come with three custom enchantments:

## Octave
- Holding down the Tuning Fork and then releasing allows you to dash forward in a burst of sound.

## Shrill
- Upon blocking an attack, all nearby enemies will gain the **Deafened** effect, which mutes all sound, along with stopping the velocity of nearby enemies.

## Symphony
- If the user dies while blocking, they will be saved and given invincibility for 10 seconds. **However**, upon the ten seconds being completed the user will instantly die. No exceptions.

# How to Obtain Ancillary, and Tuning Forks!
**Ancillary** is the metal used by this mod to create Tuning Forks. By placing a Quartz block above a lava cauldron, then using an Axe on it, it will transform into a block of Ancillary.

Then, break that Ancillary block and stonecut it into **Ancillary Bits**, which can be used to make Tuning Forks.

# Skins!
Since I had a lot of Tuning Fork textures, I thought I'd add some skins you goofy goobers can use!!!!

Simply shift + right-click on a Smithing Table to cycle between them.

# FAQ!
- Are these assets made by you?
No, they were made by an extremely talented artist, KindlingCinder! Along with the original concept for Attuned, which she abandoned. All assets used I was given permission for!!!

- Will this mod recieve updates?
Likely not, since I usually don't update mods like this.

- Is there a chance this will be updated for (modloader) or (modversion)?
No. I don't use any mod loader other than Fabric, and this mod was made for a specific server. It's only public because I thought it would be fun.


# FULL CREDITS!
A full list of all the goobers who made this possible! :3

#### AcoYT (https://modrinth.com/user/AcoYT)
Coding help, "Galestar" skin GUI Texture, Shockwave texture, "Deafness" effect icon.

#### Arcticiki
"Symphony" enchantment concept, combat playtester.

#### HarmoniousWren
Combat playtester.

#### eeverest (https://modrinth.com/user/eeverest)
Light coding help (primarily the skin system).

#### KindlingCinder (https://modrinth.com/user/KindlingCinder)
"Valediction", "Amarite Tuning Fork", and "Galestar" handheld textures, along with the Ancillary Block and Bit textures. Also designed the original concept for the mod which was adapted into Attuned!

#### Chemthunder (https://modrinth.com/user/Chemthunder)
Developer, and conceptor.

#### And Failed Voyage SMP as a whole!
They all helped make this possible: playtesting, ideas, and help all working together, along with cheering me on to finish this project!

### And You!
Not really I could not care less about you.
